title: limonium ramosissimum subsp. ramosissimum
intro: Limonium ramosissimum subsp. ramosissimum, also known as the 'tree limonium', is a succulent shrub native to the Mediterranean region, characterized by its dense, branching stems and small white flowers. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Limonium ramosissimum subsp. ramosissimum include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and exhibiting antimicrobial activity against certain bacteria and fungi. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which are used to treat a range of health issues, from skin conditions to respiratory problems.
